overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet reflective streets, towering holographic advertisements, palm trees, and neon-lit architecture. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's ray-traced lighting and detailed urban environment as the camera moves from an open plaza into a covered pedestrian walkway.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide futuristic plaza at night, with wet reflective pavement mirroring the vibrant neon lights from surrounding holographic billboards. Palm trees line the walkway while the camera moves forward through the open space, passing various illuminated advertisements and modern glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with corporate advertising and building entrances

events.description: approaching the ARASAKA building with large corporate posters on the right
approaching the entrance to a covered pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while turning slightly right toward the covered walkway entrance, passing corporate advertisements

entered.detail: large illuminated corporate posters displaying armed figures and ARASAKA branding
digital billboard displaying health warning text with orange and white coloring
entrance to a covered pedestrian passage with overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the ARASAKA corporate building with large illuminated posters on the right, while the palm trees and fountain recede behind. The scene transitions toward a covered walkway entrance as the camera continues forward through the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with continuous neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered walkway with overhead blue neon strip lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pedestrian pathway beneath the blue neon lights, with glass railings visible to the left

entered.detail: overhead roof structure providing shelter with integrated lighting
continuous strip of bright cyan-blue neon lighting running along the right building facade
transparent glass barriers overlooking a lower level or street to the left

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by continuous blue neon strip lights along the right side. The wet pavement continues to reflect the artificial lighting while glass railings on the left overlook the lower city levels, and distant skyscrapers remain visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit futuristic plaza into the enclosed confines of a covered pedestrian walkway. It begins by gliding across wet, reflective pavement that mirrors vibrant holographic billboards and palm trees under a dark night sky. As the camera moves forward, the open plaza recedes and the scene shifts past the Arasaka corporate building and its towering illuminated posters. The movement then carries the viewer from the open street into a sheltered corridor, where the environment transforms into a tunnel of blue neon strip lights. Finally, the perspective settles within this walkway, passing glass railings that overlook the lower city levels while distant skyscrapers remain visible ahead.
